prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game-map art candidate, not authoritative geography
Primary request: Create a stylized isometric pixel-art map of Japan for a railway ambience simulator, as geographically faithful as possible: Hokkaido, Honshu, Shikoku, Kyushu, Tokyo Bay, Ise Bay, Osaka Bay, Seto Inland Sea, major mountain ranges, coastline shape recognizable.
Style/medium: late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese railway management sim, A-Train / SimCity reference, dense but readable pixel-art, blue ocean, green land, small city clusters, thin rail corridors, soft atmospheric lighting.
Composition/framing: full Japan overview, no UI, no labels, no readable text, no logos.
Constraints: prioritize actual Japan silhouette and island placement; no fantasy islands, no wrong continent, no photorealism, no watermark.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game-map art candidate, not authoritative geography
Primary request: Create a dense isometric pixel-art Tokyo Station / Marunouchi / Yaesu railway district scene for a Shinkansen ambience simulator.
Subject: Tokyo Station area, many parallel rail tracks and platforms, dense office blocks, roads, waterways near Tokyo Bay, catenary, small trees, late-1990s Japanese railway sim detail.
Style/medium: A-Train / early-2000s SimCity-like isometric pixel-art, detailed coherent city, not low-poly, not photorealistic.
Composition/framing: wide city tile, no UI, no readable text, no labels, no logos, no watermark.
Constraints: must feel like central Tokyo, not countryside; no fake rural fields dominating.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game-map art candidate, not authoritative geography
Primary request: Create a dense isometric pixel-art Shin-Yokohama railway district scene for a Shinkansen ambience simulator.
Subject: elevated Shinkansen corridor, urban/suburban Yokohama blocks, river/canal hints, roads, station complex, catenary, mixed mid-rise buildings and parks.
Style/medium: late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese railway management sim, A-Train / SimCity reference, detailed coherent city.
Composition/framing: wide city tile, no UI, no readable text, no labels, no logos, no watermark.
Constraints: must feel like Yokohama urban rail district, not generic coast fantasy.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: game-map art candidate, not authoritative geography
Primary request: Create a dense isometric pixel-art Nagoya Station railway district scene for a Shinkansen ambience simulator.
Subject: major rail terminal, broad roads, dense commercial blocks, elevated/ground rail approaches, catenary, subtle castle/civic references, Japanese urban fabric.
Style/medium: late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese railway management sim, A-Train / SimCity reference, detailed coherent city.
Composition/framing: wide city tile, no UI, no readable text, no labels, no logos, no watermark.
Constraints: must feel like Nagoya, not Tokyo or rural farmland.

Use case: stylized-concept

Primary request: Create a dense isometric pixel-art Kyoto Station railway district scene for a Shinkansen ambience simulator.
Subject: Kyoto Station, Shinkansen platforms, gridded city blocks, temple/wood accents, mountains in distance, river hints, compact urban fabric.
Style/medium: late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese railway management sim, A-Train / SimCity reference, detailed coherent city.
Composition/framing: wide city tile, no UI, no readable text, no labels, no logos, no watermark.
Constraints: must feel like Kyoto city, not rural-only landscape.

Use case: stylized-concept

Primary request: Create a dense isometric pixel-art Shin-Osaka railway district scene for a Shinkansen ambience simulator.
Subject: major interchange station, multiple rail corridors, dense Osaka urban blocks, river/canal hints, roads, catenary, platforms, bridges.
Style/medium: late-1990s/early-2000s Japanese railway management sim, A-Train / SimCity reference, detailed coherent city.
Composition/framing: wide city tile, no UI, no readable text, no labels, no logos, no watermark.
